steps.t: Resilient mould, glimmering salt, and Agarnaith fruit can all be found in Minas Morgul. You should recover these ingredients.
A mortar and pestle can be found at Barad Orhant. You should grind up the ingredients.
A mortar and pestle can be found at Barad Orhant. You should remove the potential remedy from the mortar and pestle.
Sick Rangers can be found in Barad Orhant. You should treat the Rangers with the potential remedy.
Arodor can be found in Barad Orhant. You should talk to Arodor.
